contextual.title: Interleukin-1 Blockade in Recently Decompensated Heart Failure

metadata.brief_title: Interleukin-1 Blockade in Recently Decompensated Heart Failure
metadata.exclusion_criteria: Subjects will not be eligible if they meet any of the following 15
metadata.brief_summary: The RED-HART is a randomized double-blinded placebo-controlled study of Anakinra (IL-1 blocker) in patients with recently decompensated heart failure to determine the safety and efficacy in terms of aerobic exercise capacity and ventilatory efficiency measured with a cardiopulmonary exercise test.

Heart Failure.definition: Heart failure caused by dysfunction of the MYOCARDIUM, leading to defective cardiac emptying (contraction) or filling (relaxation).
Heart failure caused by dysfunction of the MYOCARDIUM, leading to defective cardiac emptying (contraction) or filling (relaxation).
